label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 20

extraction.one_line_summary: POELS Wout attacked inside 1km from a five-rider breakaway quintet, timing his move perfectly to hold off late-charging EVENEPOEL Remco on the throw.
tactical_patterns: Breakaway of 32 riders ballooned to 10 minutes because Jumbo-Visma prioritized protecting KUSS's jersey over controlling quality escapees.
EVENEPOEL repeatedly bridged at 80+ km/hr on descents after being dropped on climbs, revealing superior descending as breakaway tactic.
POELS attacked inside lane with 300m remaining from quintet, exploiting hesitation rather than waiting for traditional sprint leadout.
Spanish riders skirmished 10+ minutes behind breakaway despite GC being decided, suggesting team orders couldn't suppress individual ambitions on penultimate mountain stage.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: dropped on final climb at 70km but relied purely on descending prowess to rejoin, suggesting climbing durability issues late-race
rider_signals.POELS Wout: positive: precisely timed inside-lane attack with 300m remaining from select group, showing sprint calculation rare for climbing domestiques
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: neutral: Jumbo-Visma finally committed full protection despite minimal 17-second margin, revealing team indecision throughout race
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: made quintet selection on final climb despite not being pure climber, demonstrating sustained form late in three-week race
